case_title: COURNALE, CLYDE vs. MYERS, LEORA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE, CLYDE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS, LEORA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS, LEORA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MYERS, LEORA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4338 CALIFORNIA STREET, LEASE FORFEITED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS, LEORA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $45.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE, CLYDE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE, CLYDE AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS, LEORA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE, CLYDE SERVED MAY-29-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS, LEORA
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
